history.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$listener = New-Object System.Net.HttpListener; $listener.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:18765/'); $listener.Start(); Write-Host 'LISTENING'; $ctx = $listener.GetContext(); $body = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($ctx.Request.InputStream); $csv = $body.ReadToEnd(); $csv | Out-File -FilePath 'A:\HelloWorld\data\sedi_insider_transactions_2026-05-25.csv' -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline; $ctx.Response.StatusCode = 200; $ctx.Response.Close(); $listener.Stop(); Write-Host 'DONE:' ($csv.Split([char]10).Count - 1)"
